doctors.name: Dr. Ali-Reza Etemadieh
doctors.bio: Dr. Ali-Reza Etemadieh brings his extensive dental expertise to Orange County Dental Care, which he established in 2013. Born in Iran and raised in Germany, Dr. Etemadieh chose dentistry after a personal dental experience changed his career path from medicine to dentistry. He's committed to providing the highest quality dental care in a warm, welcoming environment where every patient is treated like family.

He's committed to providing the highest quality dental care in a warm, welcoming environment where every patient is treated like family.

content.heroTagline: Transform Your Smile with Exceptional Care
content.heroHeadline: Transform Your Smile with Exceptional Care
content.aboutText: Experience the difference at Orange County Dental Care where quality meets compassion. Our team provides personalized dental treatments using advanced technology in our two convenient locations in Ora

testimonials.text: The comprehensive care I receive at Orange County Dental Care has kept my smile healthy for years. Their attention to detail during cleanings is outstanding!
After years of dental problems, Dr. Etemadieh restored my smile completely. I can eat anything now, and my teeth look completely natural!
I never used to smile in photos, but after my treatment with Dr. Etemadieh, I can't stop smiling! The results look so natural—just a better version of my own teeth.
My orthodontic treatment with Dr. Etemadieh transformed not just my smile but my confidence. The process was so much easier than I expected, and the results are amazing!
As someone who avoided the dentist for years due to anxiety, the sedation option Dr. Etemadieh coordinated completely changed my experience. I was able to get the dental care I needed without stress!
When my crown fell off during dinner, Orange County Dental Care saw me first thing the next morning. Dr. Etemadieh fixed it quickly and painlessly—I couldn't be more grateful!
My dental implant has completely changed my life. I can eat anything, and nobody can tell it's not my natural tooth. Dr. Etemadieh's work is truly exceptional.
My new dentures from Dr. Etemadieh have completely transformed how I feel about myself. They're comfortable, look natural, and I can eat all my favorite foods again!

faqs.question: How often should I have a dental cleaning?
faqs.answer: Most patients benefit from cleanings every six months, but those with gum disease or certain health conditions may need more frequent visits. Dr. Etemadieh will recommend the optimal schedule for your needs.

faqs.question: How long do dental crowns last?
faqs.answer: With proper care, high-quality crowns like those we provide at Orange County Dental Care can last 15 years or more. Regular check-ups help ensure their continued performance and fit.

faqs.question: How long does teeth whitening last?
faqs.answer: Professional whitening results can last from several months to a year or more, depending on your habits. Avoiding staining foods and beverages and maintaining good oral hygiene can extend the results.

faqs.question: Am I too old for orthodontic treatment?
faqs.answer: No, there's no age limit for orthodontic treatment. Many of our patients are adults who decide to improve their smile later in life. Modern options like clear aligners make treatment more appealing for adult professionals.

faqs.question: Is sedation dentistry safe?
faqs.answer: Yes, when administered by qualified specialists, sedation dentistry is very safe. Prior to recommending any sedation option, we review your complete medical history to identify any potential risks or contraindications.

faqs.question: What should I do if my tooth gets knocked out?
faqs.answer: Pick up the tooth by the crown (not the root), rinse it gently without scrubbing, and if possible, place it back in the socket. If that's not possible, keep it in milk or saliva and call us immediately. Time is criti

faqs.question: Am I a candidate for dental implants?
faqs.answer: Most adults with good general health are candidates for implants. Dr. Etemadieh will evaluate factors such as bone density, gum health, and medical history to determine if implants are right for you.

faqs.question: How long does it take to get used to new dentures?
faqs.answer: Most patients adjust to new dentures within a few weeks. Initially, you may experience increased saliva flow, some soreness, and changes in speech, but these issues typically resolve as you adapt to your new teet

additionalContent.title: New Patient Welcome
additionalContent.content: Learn more about our new patient specials, discounts, and the excellent service we give our patients! Our goal is for your first visit to be one of comfort and acknowledgement of your personal dental needs. We will take the required time to properly diagnose your immediate dental concerns, review your past medical and dental history, and create a treatment plan that provides for your optimal dental health. With your cooperation, we will complete a thorough comprehensive dental evaluation.

additionalContent.title: Meet the Doctor
additionalContent.content: Dr. Ali-Reza Etemadieh has been providing exceptional dental care to Orange County residents since 2013. With extensive training in implants and cosmetics, he's dedicated to delivering high-quality dentistry in a comfortable environment where patients feel valued and understood.

additionalContent.title: Schedule Your Visit in Orange County
additionalContent.content: Experience the difference at Orange County Dental Care where quality meets compassion. Our team provides personalized dental treatments using advanced technology in our two convenient locations in Ora

additionalContent.title: Why Choose Us?
additionalContent.content: At Orange County Dental Care, we prioritize quality above all else. Dr. Etemadieh is the dentist that other dentists trust with their own care. We never compromise on integrity, materials, or service—ensuring that every patient receives the highest standard of dental treatment available.

additionalContent.title: Serving Orange County with Excellence
additionalContent.content: Visit us at our convenient Orange or Tustin location. Our modern practices feature the latest dental technology including digital x-rays and intraoral scanners to ensure accurate diagnoses and comfortable treatments. We welcome patients of all ages and proudly offer care in multiple languages.

additionalContent.title: Start Your Dental Journey Today
additionalContent.content: Experience the Orange County Dental Care difference where quality meets compassion. Our dedicated team is ready to provide you with exceptional dental care tailored to your unique needs.

additionalContent.title: Reach Us
additionalContent.content:
Orange Office

Tustin Office

additionalContent.title: Our Preventative Services
additionalContent.content: Our preventative care includes professional cleanings, comprehensive exams, digital x-rays, oral cancer screenings, fluoride treatments, and periodontal care. These services work together to remove plaque and tartar, detect early signs of decay or disease, and strengthen your teeth against future damage. We customize your preventative care schedule based on your unique needs.

additionalContent.title: Benefits of Prevention
additionalContent.content: Regular preventative care offers numerous benefits beyond just avoiding cavities. It helps maintain fresh breath, prevents gum disease, reduces the risk of tooth loss, saves money on extensive treatments, and contributes to better overall health. Research has shown connections between oral health and conditions like heart disease and diabetes.

additionalContent.title: Protect Your Smile with Preventative Care
additionalContent.content: During your preventative visit at Orange County Dental Care, our hygienist will thoroughly clean your teeth, removing plaque and tartar that can't be addressed with regular brushing and flossing. Dr. Etemadieh will conduct a comprehensive examination, checking for signs of decay, gum disease, oral cancer, and other concerns. Based on your examination, we'll develop a personalized preventative care plan that may include recommendations for at-home care, professional cleaning frequency, and any additional treatments to address your specific needs.

additionalContent.title: Restore & Renew
additionalContent.content: Damage to your teeth doesn't have to be permanent. At Orange County Dental Care, our restorative dental services rebuild, repair, and renew teeth that have been affected by decay, injury, or wear. Using premium materials and advanced techniques, Dr. Etemadieh provides restorative treatments that not only return function to your teeth but also enhance their appearance and longevity.

additionalContent.title: Our Restorative Services
additionalContent.content: We offer a comprehensive range of restorative treatments including tooth-colored fillings, crowns made of zirconia or gold, bridges, inlays and onlays, root canal therapy, and full mouth rehabilitation. For every procedure, we use only the highest quality materials—avoiding amalgam in favor of more aesthetic and biocompatible options. Each restoration is precisely crafted to match your natural teeth.

additionalContent.title: Benefits of Restoration
additionalContent.content: Restorative dentistry does more than just repair damage—it restores your ability to eat, speak, and smile with confidence. By addressing issues promptly, we can prevent further deterioration and more complex problems. Our restorative treatments are designed to be durable and natural-looking, preserving as much of your natural tooth structure as possible.

additionalContent.title: Restore Your Smile's Health and Beauty
additionalContent.content: The restorative process begins with a thorough examination to assess your dental needs. Dr. Etemadieh will discuss your treatment options, taking into account factors such as the extent of damage, your aesthetic goals, and your overall oral health. Most restorative procedures can be completed in just one or two visits, with every attention paid to your comfort throughout. For more extensive restorations, we'll create a comprehensive treatment plan.

additionalContent.title: Smile Transformation
additionalContent.content: Your smile creates lasting impressions. At Orange County Dental Care, our cosmetic dentistry services are designed to enhance the appearance of your teeth and create the smile you've always wanted. Dr. Etemadieh combines artistic vision with technical expertise to deliver beautiful, natural-looking results. From subtle improvements to dramatic transformations, we tailor our approach to your unique goals.

additionalContent.title: Our Cosmetic Services
additionalContent.content: We offer a comprehensive range of cosmetic treatments including professional teeth whitening, porcelain veneers, chairside composite veneers, dental bonding and contouring, and Invisalign clear aligners. Each service is customized to address your specific concerns—whether that's discoloration, chips, gaps, misalignment, or a complete smile makeover. Our focus is always on creating results that look naturally beautiful.

additionalContent.title: Benefits of Cosmetic Dentistry
additionalContent.content: The benefits of cosmetic dentistry extend far beyond appearance. A beautiful smile can boost your self-confidence, create positive first impressions, and even improve your overall oral health. Many of our cosmetic procedures not only enhance aesthetics but also streng

additionalContent.title: FAQ
additionalContent.content: Your cosmetic journey begins with a consultation where we discuss your goals and concerns. Dr. Etemadieh will evaluate your dental health and facial features to recommend the most suitable treatments. Treatment timelines vary based on the procedures selected. Some treatments, like whitening or bonding, can be completed in a single visit, while others, such as Invisalign or multiple veneers, may tak

additionalContent.title: Straight Smiles
additionalContent.content: A properly aligned smile isn't just about aesthetics—it contributes to better oral health and function. At Orange County Dental Care, we offer comprehensive orthodontic solutions including Invisalign clear aligners to help patients of all ages achieve straighter, healthier smiles. Dr. Etemadieh combines advanced technology with personalized treatment plans to deliver excellent results with maximum comfort and convenience.

additionalContent.title: Our Orthodontic Services
additionalContent.content: We provide a range of orthodontic treatment options with a focus on clear aligner therapy. Using advanced 3D digital scanning, Dr. Etemadieh creates precise treatment plans that map out the exact movements of your teeth, allowing you to see your virtual results before treatment begins. Our orthodontic solutions are designed to fit your lifestyle while effectively addressing alignment issues, spacing problems, and bite irregularities.

additionalContent.title: Benefits of Modern Orthodontics
additionalContent.content: Today's orthodontic treatments offer significant advantages over traditional methods, with options that are more comfortable, convenient, and aesthetically pleasing. Properly aligned teeth are easier to clean, reducing the risk of decay and g …[truncated]

additionalContent.title: Start Your Smile Transformation
additionalContent.content: Your orthodontic journey begins with a comprehensive evaluation where Dr. Etemadieh assesses your teeth, jaw, and overall oral health. Using our advanced intraoral scanner, we create precise digital m …[truncated]

additionalContent.title: Treatment Duration
additionalContent.content: Treatment duration varies based on individual needs, with most patients completing their orthodontic therapy within 12-24 months. If you choose Invisalign, you'll receive a series of custom aligners t …[truncated]

additionalContent.title: Anxiety-Free Care
additionalContent.content: Dental anxiety shouldn't prevent you from receiving the care your smile needs. At Orange County Dental Care, we understand that visiting the dentist can be stressful for many patients. That's why we offer referrals for sedation options to help you relax during your treatment. Our compassionate approach focuses on ensuring your comfort while providing the quality dental care you deserve in a stress-free environment.

additionalContent.title: Our Sedation Approach
additionalContent.content: While Orange County Dental Care doesn't offer direct sedation services, we work closely with trusted specialists who provide various sedation options for our patients who experience dental anxiety. We can coordinate referrals based on your specific needs and the complexity of your treatment. Our primary focus remains on creating a comfortable, supportive environment for all patients through compassionate care and clear communication about each procedure.

additionalContent.title: Benefits of Sedation Dentistry
additionalContent.content: For patients with dental anxiety, sedation dentistry through our specialist partners offers numerous benefits. It allows necessary dental work to be completed comfortably, often with no memory of the procedure. This approach is also

If you experience dental anxiety, Dr. Etemadieh will discuss your concerns during your consultation and determine whether sedation might be beneficial for your treatment. Based on your medical history

On the day of your procedure, the sedation will be administered by the specialist according to the predetermined plan. Throughout your treatment, your vital signs will be monitored to ensure your safe

additionalContent.title: Urgent Relief
additionalContent.content: Dental emergencies can happen at any time, often causing significant pain and anxiety. At Orange County Dental Care, we provide prompt, effective emergency dental services to address your urgent needs and relieve your discomfort. Dr. Etemadieh makes emergency patients a priority, offering same-day appointments whenever possible and after-hours care when needed for serious situations.

additionalContent.title: Our Emergency Services
additionalContent.content: We handle a full range of dental emergencies including severe toothaches, broken or chipped teeth, knocked-out teeth, lost fillings or crowns, dental abscesses, soft tissue injuries, and objects caught between teeth. Our focus is on relieving your pain quickly and addressing the underlying problem effectively. When you call with an emergency, our team will provide immediate guidance and arrange for you to be seen as soon as possible.

pageInventory.title: Preventative Dental Care | Orange County Dental Care - Orange County Dental Care
pageInventory.metaDesc: Maintain your oral health with preventative dentistry at Orange County Dental Care. We offer cleanings, exams, digital x-rays, and more to keep your smile healthy.
pageInventory.h1: Preventative Dental Care in Orange County
h2s: Protect Your Smile with Preventative Care
paragraphs: 665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States
665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States

At Orange County Dental Care, we believe that preventative care is the foundation of excellent oral health. Our comprehensive preventative services help you maintain a healthy smile and avoid costly treatments down the road. From thorough cleanings to early detection of potential issues, we focus on preserving your natural teeth and preventing problems before they start.

Our preventative care includes professional cleanings, comprehensive exams, digital x-rays, oral cancer screenings, fluoride treatments, and periodontal care. These services work together to remove plaque and tartar, detect early signs of decay or disease, and strengthen your teeth against future damage. We customize your preventative care schedule based on your unique needs.

Regular preventative care offers numerous benefits beyond just avoiding cavities. It helps maintain fresh breath, prevents gum disease, reduces the risk of tooth loss, saves money on extensive treatments, and contributes to better overall health. Research has shown connections between oral health and conditions like heart disease and diabetes.

Our comprehensive preventative services help you maintain a healthy smile and avoid costly treatments down the road. From thorough cleanings to early detection of potential issues, we focus on preserving your natural teeth and preventing problems before they start.Our Preventative Services Our preventative care includes professional cleanings, comprehensive exams, digital x-rays, oral cancer screenings, fluoride treatments, and periodontal care. These services work together to remove plaque and tartar, detect early signs of decay or disease, and strengthen your teeth against future damage. We customize your preventative care schedule based on your unique needs.Benefits of Prevention Regular preventative care offers numerous benefits beyond just avoiding cavities. It helps maintain fresh breath, prevents gum disease, reduces the risk of tooth loss, saves money on extensive treatments, and contributes to better overall health. pageInventory.title: Restorative Dental Treatments | Orange County Dental Care - Orange County Dental Care
pageInventory.metaDesc: Restore your smile with our comprehensive restorative dental treatments in Orange, CA. We offer fillings, crowns, bridges, and root canals.
pageInventory.h1: Restorative Dental Care in Orange County
h2s: Restore Your Smile's Health and Beauty
paragraphs: 665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States
665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States

Damage to your teeth doesn't have to be permanent. At Orange County Dental Care, our restorative dental services rebuild, repair, and renew teeth that have been affected by decay, injury, or wear. Using premium materials and advanced techniques, Dr. Etemadieh provides restorative treatments that not only return function to your teeth but also enhance their appearance and longevity.

We offer a comprehensive range of restorative treatments including tooth-colored fillings, crowns made of zirconia or gold, bridges, inlays and onlays, root canal therapy, and full mouth rehabilitation. For every procedure, we use only the highest quality materials—avoiding amalgam in favor of more aesthetic and biocompatible options. Each restoration is precisely crafted to match your natural teeth.

Restorative dentistry does more than just repair damage—it restores your ability to eat, speak, and smile with confidence. By addressing issues promptly, we can prevent further deterioration and more complex problems. Our restorative treatments are designed to be durable and natural-looking, preserving as much of your natural tooth structure as possible.

pageInventory.title: Cosmetic Dental Services | Orange County Dental Care - Orange County Dental Care
pageInventory.metaDesc: Transform your smile with cosmetic dentistry at Orange County Dental Care. We offer teeth whitening, veneers, bonding, and Invisalign in Orange, CA.
pageInventory.h1: Cosmetic Dental Treatments in Orange County
paragraphs: 665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States
665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States

Your smile creates lasting impressions. At Orange County Dental Care, our cosmetic dentistry services are designed to enhance the appearance of your teeth and create the smile you've always wanted. Dr. Etemadieh combines artistic vision with technical expertise to deliver beautiful, natural-looking results. From subtle improvements to dramatic transformations, we tailor our approach to your unique goals.

We offer a comprehensive range of cosmetic treatments including professional teeth whitening, porcelain veneers, chairside composite veneers, dental bonding and contouring, and Invisalign clear aligners. Each service is customized to address your specific concerns—whether that's discoloration, chips, gaps, misalignment, or a complete smile makeover. Our focus is always on creating results that look naturally beautiful.

The benefits of cosmetic dentistry extend far beyond appearance. A beautiful smile can boost your self-confidence, create positive first impressions, and even improve your overall oral health. Many of our cosmetic procedures not only enhance aesthetics but also strengthen teeth and improve function, offering both immediate and long-term advantages.

pageInventory.metaDesc: Overcome dental anxiety with sedation dentistry options at Orange County Dental Care in Orange, CA. We work with specialists to provide comfortable, stress-free dental experiences for anxious patients.
paragraphs: 665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States
665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States

A properly aligned smile isn't just about aesthetics—it contributes to better oral health and function. At Orange County Dental Care, we offer comprehensive orthodontic solutions including Invisalign clear aligners to help patients of all ages achieve straighter, healthier smiles. Dr. Etemadieh combines advanced technology with personalized treatment plans to deliver excellent results with maximum comfort and convenience.

We provide a range of orthodontic treatment options with a focus on clear aligner therapy. Using advanced 3D digital scanning, Dr. Etemadieh creates precise treatment plans that map out the exact movements of your teeth, allowing you to see your virtual results before treatment begins. Our orthodontic solutions are designed to fit your lifestyle while effectively addressing alignment issues, spacing problems, and bite irregularities.

Today's orthodontic treatments offer significant advantages over traditional methods, with options that are more comfortable, convenient, and aesthetically pleasing. Properly aligned teeth are easier to clean, reducing the risk of decay and gum disease. Correcting bite issues can also alleviate jaw pain, improve speech, and enhance overall dental function. Most importantly, a straight smile can boost your confidence in personal and professional settings.

Dental anxiety shouldn't prevent you from receiving the care your smile needs. At Orange County Dental Care, we understand that visiting the dentist can be stressful for many patients. That's why we offer referrals for sedation options to help you relax during your treatment. Our compassionate approach focuses on ensuring your comfort while providing the quality dental care you deserve in a stress-free environment.

While Orange County Dental Care doesn't offer direct sedation services, we work closely with trusted specialists who provide various sedation options for our patients who experience dental anxiety. We can coordinate referrals based on your specific needs and the complexity of your treatment. Our primary focus remains on creating a comfortable, supportive environment for all patients through compassionate care and clear communication about each procedure.

For patients with dental anxiety, sedation dentistry through our specialist partners offers numerous benefits. It allows necessary dental work to be completed comfortably, often with no memory of the procedure. This approach is also beneficial for patients requiring extensive treatment, those with a strong gag reflex, or individuals with special needs who may have difficulty remaining still during dental procedures.

pageInventory.title: Emergency Dental Care | Orange County Dental Care - Orange County Dental Care
pageInventory.metaDesc: Need urgent dental care in Orange, CA? Orange County Dental Care offers emergency dental services. Call us immediately for prompt attention.
pageInventory.h1: Emergency Dental Care in Orange County
paragraphs: 665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States
665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States

Dental emergencies can happen at any time, often causing significant pain and anxiety. At Orange County Dental Care, we provide prompt, effective emergency dental services to address your urgent needs and relieve your discomfort. Dr. Etemadieh makes emergency patients a priority, offering same-day appointments whenever possible and after-hours care when needed for serious situations.

We handle a full range of dental emergencies including severe toothaches, broken or chipped teeth, knocked-out teeth, lost fillings or crowns, dental abscesses, soft tissue injuries, and objects caught between teeth. Our focus is on relieving your pain quickly and addressing the underlying problem effectively. When you call with an emergency, our team will provide immediate guidance and arrange for you to be seen as soon as possible.

Seeking prompt professional care for dental emergencies not only provides immediate pain relief but also helps prevent more serious complications. Quick intervention can often save damaged teeth, prevent infection, and reduce the need for more extensive treatment later. Our emergency care focuses on both addressing the immediate concern and developing a plan for long-term dental health.

pageInventory.title: Dental Implant Solutions | Orange County Dental Care - Orange County Dental Care
pageInventory.metaDesc: Replace missing teeth with dental implants at Orange County Dental Care. We offer high-quality American and Swiss implants for a natural-looking smile.
pageInventory.h1: Dental Implant Solutions in Orange County
paragraphs: 665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States
665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States

Dental implants represent the gold standard in tooth replacement technology. At Orange County Dental Care, Dr. Etemadieh provides premium implant solutions that look, feel, and function just like natural teeth. Using only high-quality American-made Straumann and Swiss-made Hoissen implants, we deliver results that stand the test of time. Our extensive implant training and attention to detail ensure successful outcomes that restore both function and aesthetics.

We offer comprehensive implant services including single tooth implants, multiple tooth replacement, and implant-supported dentures. Each implant is carefully placed to integrate with your jaw bone, creating a stable foundation for your new tooth. We use only premium titanium implants and custom-designed crowns that blend seamlessly with your natural teeth, ensuring both functionality and natural appearance.

Unlike traditional tooth replacement options, dental implants replace both the root and crown of missing teeth. This complete replacement prevents bone loss, maintains facial structure, and provides unmatched stability and function. Implants don't require modification of adjacent teeth, are easy to maintain, and with proper care, can last a lifetime—making them a superior long-term investment in your oral health.

pageInventory.title: Custom Denture Options | Orange County Dental Care - Orange County Dental Care
pageInventory.metaDesc: Get custom dentures at Orange County Dental Care in Orange, CA. We create comfortable, natural-looking full and partial dentures to restore your smile.
pageInventory.h1: Custom Denture Solutions in Orange County
paragraphs: 665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States
665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States

Missing teeth can significantly impact your quality of life, affecting everything from your diet to your self-confidence. At Orange County Dental Care, we provide custom-crafted denture solutions that restore your ability to eat, speak, and smile with confidence. Our dentures are designed for optimal fit, function, and natural appearance, giving you back the complete smile you deserve.

We offer a variety of denture solutions including full dentures to replace all teeth, partial dentures to fill gaps while preserving healthy teeth, and implant-supported dentures for maximum stability. Each prosthetic is custom-designed to complement your facial features and provide the most natural look possible. We use high-quality materials that balance durability with comfort and aesthetics.

Today's dentures are far superior to those of the past, offering improved comfort, aesthetics, and function. Our custom-fitted dentures restore your ability to eat a varied diet, speak clearly, and smile confidently. They also help maintain facial structure, prevent shifting of remaining teeth, and provide a cost-effective solution for multiple missing teeth.

Welcome to Orange County Dental Care’s Cookie Policy. This policy explains how we use cookies and similar technologies on our website (orangecounty-dentalcare.com) to enhance your experience and improve our services. By using our website, you consent to the use of cookies as described in this policy. For more information about how we handle your personal information, please see our Privacy Policy.

Cookies are small text files placed on your device (e.g., computer, smartphone, or tablet) when you visit a website. They help websites recognize your device, remember your preferences, and collect information about how you use the site. We also use similar technologies, such as web beacons, pixels, and tracking scripts, to achieve these purposes.

By using our website, you consent to the use of cookies as described in this policy. For more information about how we handle your personal information, please see our Privacy Policy. 1. What Are Cookies? Cookies are small text files placed on your device (e.g., computer, smartphone, or tablet) when you visit a website. They help websites recognize your device, remember your preferences, and collect information about how you use the site. We also use similar technologies, such as web beacons, pixels, and tracking scripts, to achieve these purposes. 2. How We Use CookiesWe use cookies and similar technologies for the following purposes:Essential Cookies: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly, such as maintaining your session or enabling basic navigation. You cannot disable these cookies if you wish to use our site. Analytics Cookies: We use tools like Google Analytics and Posthog to collect information about how visitors use our website (e.g., pages visited, time spent, clicks). This helps us analyze performance and improve user experience. Functional Cookies: These cookies allow us to remember your preferences (e.g., language settings) and enhance site functionality. Marketing Cookies: If applicable, we may use cookies to deliver personalized promotions or track the effectiveness of our marketing campaigns. These are only used if you opt in where required. Please note: We do not use cookies to collect Protected Health Information (PHI)
